title: Block Explorer Toolkit
body: Fetch block details, all transactions in a block, and decode individual transactions â€” all the building blocks for a custom block explorer.

title: Contract Event Dashboard
body: Build a real-time event monitor for any smart contract — poll decoded event logs and display a live activity feed for any protocol or token.

title: Contract Event Log Monitor
body: Stream all decoded event logs emitted by any smart contract â€” filter by topic hash, date, or block range. The foundation for DEX analytics, protocol dashboards, and real-time monitoring.

title: Cross-Contract Event Scanner
body: Scan ALL contracts on a chain for a specific event by topic hash â€” e.g. find every ERC-20 Transfer or every Uniswap Swap across the entire chain.

title: Event Log Decoder
body: Decode and search contract event logs across any block range and chain.

title: Gas Analytics
body: Real-time and historical gas price tracking for any EVM-compatible chain.

title: Smart Money Copier
body: Track known alpha wallets and surface their new token buys the moment they execute — build a copy trading radar using wallet activity streaming.

title: Solana Program Activity Monitor
body: Track the on-chain growth of any Solana program — DEX, lending protocol, game, or DePIN — using GoldRush's transaction data on `solana-mainnet`. Fetch daily instruction call count, unique signing wallets per day, week-over-week growth rate, and cumulative user count over any 90-day window. Compare two programs head-to-head on the same metrics. Use for investor due diligence on early-stage protocols, health monitoring dashboards, or surfacing underrated programs with breakout growth before they trend.

title: Solana Smart Money Tracker
body: Identify high-alpha Solana wallets using GoldRush: fetch recent token buys via transaction history, calculate realized PnL from decoded swap history, and surface wallets with consistently profitable trades (>2x average return over 30 days). Once you have a watchlist, subscribe to their real-time activity stream to receive instant push notifications the moment they buy a new token — before it shows up on Dexscreener. Build a Solana copy-trading radar, alpha group feed, or smart-money signal layer for your trading agent.

title: Token OHLCV Chart
body: Real-time OHLCV candlestick data for any token — stream live candles via WebSocket for TradingView-style charts.

title: Token Price History
body: Fetch historical spot prices and OHLCV data for any ERC-20 token onchain.

title: Wallet Activity Heatmap
body: Generate a GitHub-style activity heatmap showing daily transaction counts for any wallet â€” visualize on-chain behaviour patterns.

title: Wallet Comparison Tool
body: Compare two wallet addresses side-by-side — token holdings, transaction count, wallet age, and NFT inventory across the same chain.

title: Whale Wallet Watchlist
body: Monitor a list of whale wallets in real-time — subscribe to live transaction streams for multiple addresses and alert when they move large amounts.
